visual: Same "Marbles" data. Graph showing Scale of 10. Scale Preview System interactive.
guide: "Let's try a smaller scale. Try a Scale of 2."
preview_displays: All bars land exactly. ✓ indicator. No warnings.
guide_2: "Look—we can read the end of the bars clearly. ALL the numbers land exactly. 7 is right at 7, exactly halfway between 6 and 8. 12 is right at 12."
guide_3: "With Scale of 2, half of 2 is 1. So you can show ANY whole number exactly."
key_teaching_point: "Scale of 2 works to show the exact value for all numbers—and for small data, the graph won't have too many marks on the axis."
